title: Flour Shaker,7oz Lid Icing Sugar Shaker for Cappuccino,Stainless Steel Chocolate Shaker for Cappuccino,Premium Fine Mesh Flour for Kitchen Roasting,Dessert Decoration,Cappuccino Coffee Decor
features: Premium Stainless Steel Construction – Durable and rust-resistant design ensures long-lasting use in busy kitchens and cafés.
Fine Mesh Lid for Even Sprinkling – Distributes powders like icing sugar, cocoa, flour, and cinnamon evenly without clumping for professional-quality decoration.
Size for Precision – Compact 7oz capacity offers excellent control, making it ideal for dusting cappuccinos, desserts, and baked goods.
Versatile Kitchen Tool – Suitable for various uses including baking, roasting, dessert decoration, and coffee topping, enhancing flavour and presentation.
Easy to Clean and Refill – Simple to disassemble and clean, allowing hassle-free maintenance and quick powder refills during busy service.
description: Elevate your baking and coffee-making experience with this premium 7oz Stainless Steel Flour and Icing Sugar Shaker, designed to effortlessly sprinkle fine powders like icing sugar, cocoa, flour, or cinnamon.cappuccino decoration, dessert garnishing, and kitchen roasting, this shaker ensures an even and precise dusting every time. Crafted from durable stainless steel, the shaker features a fine mesh lid that disperses powders evenly without clumping, giving your baked goods and coffee the finishing touch. Its compact 7oz size makes it easy to handle and ideal for both professional baristas and home cooks. Whether you’re dusting delicate pastries, decorating cappuccinos with chocolate or cocoa powder, or adding a light flour coating for roasting, this versatile shaker is an essential kitchen tool. Its sleek design complements any kitchen or café setup, combining functionality with style. Easy to clean and refill, this shaker is a practical addition for anyone who appreciates precision and quality in their culinary creations. Enhance your desserts and drinks with the sprinkle using this stainless steel fine mesh shaker.
